name: bootstrap-workflow-codex
description: Codex-native team workflow skills for brief, design, review, plan, build, qa, ship, debugging, drift checks, and autonomous delivery.

interface.longDescription: Structured Codex workflow skills for turning ambiguous work into scoped briefs, designs, review findings, implementation plans, coordinated builds, QA passes, and shipping evidence.
defaultPrompt: Run the team workflow for this feature.
Review this design and turn it into a build plan.
QA the current diff and tell me what is unsafe.
